scripts.build:web: mkdir -p www && cp index.html app.js tech-catalog.js styles.css sw.js manifest.json icon-180.png icon-192.png icon-512.png oasis-logo.png WO_TEMPLATE.xlsm www/ && if [ -f "QUOTE_TEMPLATE.xlsx" ]; then cp "QUOTE_TEMPLATE.xlsx" www/; elif [ -f "QUOTE TEMPLATE.xlsx" ]; then cp "QUOTE TEMPLATE.xlsx" www/; elif [ -f "1. QUOTE TEMPLATE.xlsx" ]; then cp "1. QUOTE TEMPLATE.xlsx" www/; fi
scripts.predeploy:check: npm run build:web && npm run test:estimate-export
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.apk:debug: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
